## What does this change?

<!-- A short description of the change and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Docs / README fix
- [ ] Compose / nginx / config change
- [ ] Image version bump
- [ ] Other (describe):

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, real `INSTALLATION_API_KEY`, or `.env.selfhost` included
- [ ] `docker compose -f docker-compose.selfhost.yml config` passes (if compose changed)
- [ ] I tested the change locally where applicable
- [ ] Changes stay consistent with the official docs (https://docs.buildbase.app/self-hosted/overview)
